mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_PW , U.USER_NAME , U.USER_AGE , U.USER_TEL , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_ADDR , U.REG_DATE , U.IS_USING , U.USER_ROLE , I.ORIGIN_FILE_NAME , I.ATTACHED_FILE_NAME FROM FARMSEYE_USER U LEFT JOIN USER_IMG I ON U.USER_ID = I.USER_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE FARMSEYE_USER SET IS_USING = 'N' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_USING = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , USER_PW , USER_ROLE , USER_NAME , IS_USING FROM FARMSEYE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_USING = 'Y'
SELECT USER_ID , USER_PW , USER_TEL , USER_EMAIL , USER_ADDR FROM FARMSEYE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID , USER_TEL , USER_EMAIL , USER_ADDR FROM FARMSEYE_USER
SELECT STORED_PATH FROM IMG_UPLOAD_TEST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY IMG_CODE DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT IMG_CODE , ORIGINAL_NAME , STORED_PATH , USER_ID FROM IMG_UPLOAD_TEST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
